title: swertia angustifolia var. hamiltoniana
intro: Swertia angustifolia var. hamiltoniana is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and supporting the immune system. Swertia angustifolia var. hamiltoniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
